title: Boat Racing Enhanced
description: A Modpack made to improve your Ice Boat Racing experience!
body:
![Boat Racing Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/078c4596919f791a7df9db5a8431457fee8c1d75.png)

# Boat Racing Enhanced

Enjoy boat racing Enhanced far past Vanilla Minecraft with the Boat Racing Enhanced modpack!

Perfect those lap times and improve your race pace with these Boat Racing mods:

**Boat Cam:** This mod allows you to see the apex of every corner allowing for perfection beyond the default game

**Boat HUD:** You can see just how fast your Boat is going along with seeing every input you make to move the Boat along

**Bobby + Nvidium:** Bobby creates fake chunks allowing you to see far further than what the server allows, Nvidium gives a sizeable performance increase to Nvidia graphics card users along with fixing a chunk loading issue with bobby

Many tracks on the main Boat Racing servers require the mod Boat Utils which allows you to Go up blocks in a boat!


## Why did I make this Modpack?

I want to offer Boat Racing modpack options for both beginners and experienced players, so you can choose the Boat Racing modpack you like the most!

I prioritize quality over immediate updates, so it may take some time to update to newer Minecraft versions as I'll carefully select the best mods for Ice Boat Racing with practicality and aestheics in mind. However, I'll always ensure this modpack stays current with the version Ice Boat Racing is played on!
